helpful: The provisioned petition included the complete merits argument and the relevant lower-court analysis.

gaps: Issue-aware corpus search would produce more comparable cert priors than court-and-era filters.

notes: The corpus query returned broad recent grant priors but no issue-level analogues. The MCP searches failed gracefully; the prediction remained well supported by the provisioned record and committed base rates.
